Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class ShowDirectoriesRequest

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.ShowDirectoriesRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.avro.generic.GenericContainer, org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
public class ShowDirectoriesRequest extends Object implements org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
A set of parameters for GPUdb.showDirectories.

Shows information about directories in KiFS. Can be used to show a single directory, or all directories.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShowDirectoriesRequest

      public ShowDirectoriesRequest()
      Constructs a ShowDirectoriesRequest object with default parameters.

    • ShowDirectoriesRequest

      public ShowDirectoriesRequest(String directoryName, Map<String,String> options)
      Constructs a ShowDirectoriesRequest object with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      directoryName - The KiFS directory name to show. If empty, shows all directories. The default value is ''.
      options - Optional parameters. The default value is an empty Map.
